entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'you can also check the IDE run logs via C:\Users\HiH8e\OneDrive\Desktop\RawrXD-IDE

Implement or remove the inlineEditRequested signal/slot usage in AgenticTextEdit to resolve the linker errors.
Decide whether CLI/ModelLoader targets should be built without GUI/curl; either add the missing headers/deps or conditionally exclude those targets when optional deps are absent.
Fix ChatHistoryManager/GetTelemetry link inputs in QtShell/Win32IDE (ensure the database/telemetry sources are linked or adjust calls).
Reconcile EnhancedModelLoader vs format_router/CompressionType definitions and missing members; align header/impl and remove the qtapp gguf_loader enum clash.
Update model_loader_bench to the current settings/telemetry/Vulkan APIs.
Resolve moc duplication for AgenticToolExecutor in tests (avoid compiling two moc definitions—either drop moc from one target or move the class to a shared header-only moc target).
Rebuild after these fixes.'

Chat Edit: 'Close any applications that might be locking build files
Clean the entire build directory: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force d:/RawrXD-production-lazy-init/build/*
Reconfigure CMake: cmake -B build -G "Visual Studio 17 2022" -A x64
Rebuild: cmake --build build --config Release'
Chat Edit: '@agent Enable: "Enable GPT-5.2-Codex for all clients"'
Chat Edit: 'can the visual clutter only be shown if a command is ran in the cli via server info'
